name: Dan Crenshaw
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $871,815 for Dan Crenshaw in U.S. House, TX-02. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
